title: Maine Legislature Schedule of Public Hearings and Work Sessions
description: Index page links to client-rendered (AJAX) hearing schedules; monitored by full-page fingerprint. The underlying JSON endpoint (legislature.maine.gov/bills/getPHWSForDate.asp) was investigated 2026-07 but ignores its date parameters and returns only stale sessions (116-123), so it is not usable for structured hearing extraction; revisit if the Legislature fixes it.
